phase_statuses.title: Split the knowledge upload hook into focused frontend units
phase_statuses.objective: Extract bounded helper modules for dataset state, extension settings, and upload-file actions while keeping `useKnowledgeUploadPage` as the stable composition hook.

acceptance_criteria.text: `useKnowledgeUploadPage.js` no longer directly owns knowledge-base loading/filtering, allowed-extension settings management, and file-selection/upload flow logic in one hook body.
`KnowledgeUpload.js` continues to consume the same hook-facing contract without page-level behavior changes.
missing visible knowledge bases, unavailable allowed extensions, and upload failures still fail fast through the existing error and state channels instead of introducing silent downgrade paths.

phase_statuses.notes: - - Split the knowledge upload page hook into focused dataset, extension-settings, and file-upload helpers while preserving the page-facing contract.

phase_statuses.title: Focused frontend regression validation and task evidence
phase_statuses.objective: Prove the bounded upload-hook refactor preserved current hook/page/API behavior.

acceptance_criteria.text: focused knowledge-upload Jest suites pass against the final code state.
task artifacts record the exact commands run, verified acceptance coverage, and bounded residual risk.

phase_statuses.notes: - - Focused Jest evidence recorded for the hook, page, and upload API suites with bounded residual risk documented in task artifacts.

goal: 继续进行前后端重构直到重构结束：本 tranche 聚焦 fronted/src/features/knowledge/upload/useKnowledgeUploadPage.js，拆分知识库加载筛选、扩展名配置管理、文件选择与上传流程状态，保持 KnowledgeUpload 页面返回契约与现有 Jest 测试行为稳定
